cited_evidence: INV-OVX-021 specifies thermal-transport hold class for OVX-9 lot L-882 inventory release
ALERT-OVX-HOLD-021 records thermal-transport hold class on the return record
DISP-OVX-021 row QD-74 assigns MAT-R authority for OVX-9 lot L-882 under packaging-inspection hold class
STD-OVX-021-P requires product, lot, hold class, and release path to match before inventory movement
critical_features_preserved: INV-OVX-021 release references thermal-transport but disposition matrix authorizes packaging-inspection
product = OVX-9, lot = L-882, release path = sellable inventory consistent across sources
final_answer: ESCALATE. The inventory release INV-OVX-021 and quality hold alert ALERT-OVX-HOLD-021 both reference thermal-transport hold class, while disposition matrix DISP-OVX-021 row QD-74 assigns packaging-inspection hold class for the same product-lot combination. The policy boundary requires exact hold-class matching; this mismatch is a concrete field discrepancy, not a warning tone. The move to sellable inventory must not proceed until DISP-OVX-021 is reconciled to thermal-transport or INV-OVX-021 is reissued to packaging-inspection, with matching source IDs on both.
open_blockers: DISP-OVX-021 hold class (packaging-inspection) does not match INV-OVX-021 and ALERT-OVX-HOLD-021 hold class (thermal-transport)
No bridging source record reconciles the hold-class discrepancy
Invented formal hold-release document is not required; only source-bound reconciliation of DISP-OVX-021 is required

quality_hold_closeout_binding.controlling_source_fact: DISP-OVX-021 row QD-74 assigns packaging-inspection for OVX-9 lot L-882; INV-OVX-021 references thermal-transport; source mismatch blocks close-out

warning_or_prelim_artifact_handling: ALERT-OVX-HOLD-021 is a visible boundary artifact but does not authorize movement alone; disposition evidence must match the same hold class. No invented formal hold-release document is created. Repair requires source-bound reconciliation of DISP-OVX-021 to thermal-transport or reissuance of INV-OVX-021 to packaging-inspection, preserving product, lot, and release path.
